description:
This one has a little story... Which I could avoid posting, but...

I saw a somewhat similar position a couple of days ago in a game and thought of posting it but it was side-based so the solution wasn't as nice. Playing around with it a bit, I got tired and threw it away to the one-day-I'll-make-problems-out-of-these archive...

2 days ago, the free weekly lecture held by MingJiu7p (They alternate with GuoJuan5p) on kgs, opened with this position! Well naturally seeing how nice it works by the corner, I couldn't ressist but to post it... Enjoy! =)
